ARC-Challenge, 25-shot, Inflection-1 column of a comparison table (Inflection-2.5 vs Inflection-1 vs GPT-4) on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2.5 launch page. The table is rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/7EntAgSnt8VPh6RRcGzH7kbVRk.svg) with no extractable text layer, so it does not surface via curl/grep or HTML-to-text fetch tools -- confirmed here by directly rendering the SVG asset in a browser and reading the table (HellaSwag 10-shot: Inflection-2.5=90.2/Inflection-1=85.8/GPT-4=95.3; ARC-C 25-shot: Inflection-2.5=94.6/Inflection-1=94.2/GPT-4=96.3, which matches GPT-4's well-known 96.3 ARC-Challenge-25-shot figure from OpenAI's own technical report, corroborating the chart's reliability). A separate, much lower ARC-Challenge(1-shot)=67.0 figure for Inflection-1 also appears on Inflection-2's own launch page (Table 2); the 25-shot figure is used here as it matches the shot-count convention already used for this corpus's other legacy-era ARC-Challenge entries (e.g. GPT-3.5 Turbo, sourced from the GPT-4 technical report's standard 25-shot column).

ARC-Challenge, 1-shot, Inflection-2 column of Table 2 on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Same SVG table as the piqa entry (framerusercontent.com/images/WcZyvwpmgQWfv7sUpfkL0mY3N8.svg), confirmed by direct browser rendering. Note this is a 1-shot setting (much lower than the 25-shot ARC-Challenge convention used for the Inflection-1/Inflection-2.5 entries elsewhere in this batch) -- no 25-shot ARC-Challenge figure for Inflection-2 itself was found on any Inflection AI page.
